title: Xtra Crunchy Kerala Vegetables Gulab Jamun
description: Spicy, crisp, and soothing Kerala-style vegetable gulab jamun, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Toss the grated carrots, beetroot, cabbage, and potato with ginger garlic paste, chopped green chili, and salt and pepper until evenly coated.
Add corn flour, all-purpose flour, and baking powder to the vegetable mixture and knead until a pliable dough forms.
Roll the dough into small balls about 1 inch in diameter.
Coat each ball lightly in sesame seeds, tapping off excess.
Heat oil in a deep pan to 180°C until it shimmers.
Gently slide the coated balls into the hot oil and fry until golden brown and crisp, about 4 minutes.
Remove the gulab jamuns with a slotted spoon and drain them on paper towels.
Let the snack cool slightly before serving with a side of cooling cucumber raita.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to two days.
